THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF COURT MARITAL TRUST AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT CULLEN & WOOD. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 490 - 2ND STREET, SUITE 300, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS INCLUDING ALL TENANTS AND SUBTENANTS IF ANY. DEFENDANT MUST PAY PLAINTIFF ON THE COMPLAINT: HOLD OVER DAMAGES AND PAST DUE RENT OF $6704 PLUS $110.2 FOR EACH DAY COMMENCING JUNE 1, 2008. PLAINTIFF IS PREVAILING PARTY. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS TO BE DETERMINED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
